name: ICICI Prudential Mutual Fund - ICICI Prudential Fixed Maturity Plan - Series 79 - 1126 Days Plan C
summary: ICICI Prudential Mutual Fund - ICICI Prudential Fixed Maturity Plan - Series 79 - 1126 Days Plan C is a closed-ended debt scheme. Fixed Maturity Plans (FMPs) invest in debt instruments with a fixed maturity period. ICICI Prudential Mutual Fund manages this fund.
